title: Aria coronata
taxonomy: Aria coronata is classified in the family Thymelaeaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the 'daphne family'. This plant is also classified in the genus Aria. The genus Aria is a group of small shrubs native to Europe and Asia. Aria coronata is often confused with Aria crenulata, but it has distinct differences in its leaf and flower morphology. Further research is needed to confirm its exact classification.
benefits: Aria coronata, also known as the Crested Aria, is a plant species that has been studied for its potential health benefits.
